race.description: Gold Coast Bowls & Community Club 25th July Hcp (58)
race.comment: KEEP IT LOKI (8) showed he was close to a win last start with a barnstorming finish to miss by a whisker over this distance at the Gold Coast. Hasn't always thrived at this track which is a question mark but on that last effort he looks the testing material. MISTER SELFIE (1) is in rare form. Scored two back at Ipswich then tried hard but found one better over this distance at Dalby last time. Drops a little in grade today but does have 60kgs and a wide gate to deal with. Sure to be highly competitive. YOUCOMPLETEME (10) has finished near the tail but not all that far off the winner in his two runs this prep, the latest over 1350m at Ipswich. Lightly race four-year-old ready to find his best form with blinkers going on for the first time. DIFRONZO (3) won his maiden here at this trip last start and is heading in the right direction. SUPAIRO (9) should be ready to strike form at the third run back from a spell.
